descriptionZh: 大型振动给料设备，处理能力120-800 m³/h。双偏心轴设计产生强震力，高强度钢板结构可承受大块矿石冲击。设备宽度1100-1800mm，适用于矿山、冶金等大型生产线。
descriptionEn: Heavy-duty vibrating feeding equipment with 120-800 m³/h capacity. Dual eccentric shaft design generates powerful vibration, high-strength steel structure withstands large ore impact. Width range 1100-1800mm, ideal for mining, metallurgy and other large production lines.

overview.zh: XDG系列振动给料机是物料均匀连续输送设备，利用双偏心轴激振器产生定向振动。适用于向破碎机、磨机等设备均匀供料，可处理粒度≤500mm的各类物料，给料能力30-600t/h。结构紧凑，性能可靠，广泛应用于矿山、冶金和建材行业。
overview.en: XDG Series Vibrating Feeder is a uniform continuous material conveying equipment utilizing dual eccentric shaft vibrators to produce directional vibration. It evenly feeds crushers, mills and other equipment, handling materials with particle size ≤500mm and feeding capacity of 30-600t/h. With compact structure and reliable performance, it's widely used in mining, metallurgy and construction materials industries.

zh: 双偏心轴激振系统：产生强劲定向振动，确保物料均匀输送
可调节振幅：通过调整偏心块相位角，精确控制给料量
耐磨料斗衬板：采用高硬度耐磨材料，延长使用寿命
密封防尘设计：保护关键部件，适应恶劣工作环境
变频控制系统：实现给料量的无级调节，满足不同工艺需求
低噪音减振结构：减少设备振动传递，降低工作噪音
en: Dual Eccentric Shaft Vibration System: Produces powerful directional vibration, ensuring uniform material feeding
Adjustable Amplitude: Precise control of feed rate by adjusting eccentric block phase angle
Wear-resistant Hopper Liner: Made of high-hardness wear-resistant materials, extending service life
Sealed Dust-proof Design: Protects key components, adapts to harsh working environments
Frequency Control System: Enables stepless adjustment of feeding amount to meet various process requirements
Low-noise Vibration Reduction Structure: Minimizes equipment vibration transfer, reduces operating noise

zh: 采矿行业：矿石初级破碎给料
冶金工业：原料均匀供给
电力工业：煤炭输送系统
化工行业：物料均匀供给
en: Mining Industry: Primary crushing ore feeding
Metallurgical Industry: Uniform raw material supply
Construction Materials: Sand and gravel production lines
